title: Himmelsvolk: Ein Buch von Blumen, Tieren und Gott
summaries: "Himmelsvolk: Ein Buch von Blumen, Tieren und Gott" by Waldemar Bonsels is a fairy tale book published in 1915. This poetic work follows a flower elf who becomes trapped in the mortal world after witnessing two humans in love. Over the course of a year on a forest meadow, he experiences the joys and sorrows of plants, animals, and humans. Through encounters with nature's beauty and tragedy, he searches for a love greater than what first enchanted him, leading to a spiritual revelation. (This is an automatically generated summary.)
